title: Lookup exact-one by Int32: index-only vs materialized
description: Compares current Polar.DB and SQLite on unique Int32 lookup. Each run measures two phases over the same probes: index-only key-to-offset/rowid without payload, then materialized key-to-record with payload read.

dataset.notes: Synthetic deterministic lookup dataset generated by adapters from the same manifest. Every lookup key appears exactly once.

workload.notes: Exact-one expects exactly one match. Executor records indexOnly* metrics and materialized* metrics separately.

fairness.notes: Shared intent; SQLite maps it to durable-ish PRAGMA settings, PolarDB keeps current adapter defaults.

runs.notes: One warmup and three measured runs. Raw results include index-only and materialized lookup metrics.
